name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change. Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
labels: feature

## What problem does this solve

(real pain you hit, not "would be nice")

## What would the change look like

(rough sketch — UX, commands, behavior)

## What you've already tried

## Why this fits vibe-kit's posture

CONTRIBUTING.md describes what kinds of changes land. Briefly: does this fix a bug, tighten an existing subcommand, or match an existing roadmap item? If it's a new dependency / architecture change / new product surface, expect a longer discussion before any code.
